ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "playing_role" TEXT /* Playing role of the player (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 5'10') */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player (e.g., 70 kg) */,
  "batting_hand" TEXT /* Batting hand (e.g., Right-hand, Left-hand) */,
  "bowling_arm" TEXT /* Bowling arm (e.g., Right-arm, Left-arm) */,
  "playing_since" TEXT /* Date when the player started playing professional cricket */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team participates in */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team coach */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date when the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the league (e.g., T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body (e.g., ICC, BCCI) */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of batting statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "not_outs" INTEGER /* Number of not-outs */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score */,
  "average" REAL /* Batting average */,
  "balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total balls faced */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate */,
  "centuries" INTEGER /* Number of centuries */,
  "fifties" INTEGER /* Number of fifties */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the match (T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the statistics (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "highest_innings" INTEGER /* Highest runs scored in a single innings */,
  "number_of_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Total number of balls faced */,
  "number_of_fours" INTEGER /* Total number of fours hit */,
  "number_of_sixes" INTEGER /* Total number of sixes hit */,
  "number_of_catches" INTEGER /* Total number of catches taken */,
  "number_of_stumpings" INTEGER /* Total number of stumpings taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of bowling statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "innings" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  "overs" INTEGER /* Total overs bowled */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Total runs conceded */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Total wickets taken */,
  "best_bowling" TEXT /* Best bowling performance */,
  "bowling_average" REAL /* Bowling average */,
  "economy_rate" REAL /* Economy rate */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate */,
  "four_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of four-wicket hauls */,
  "five_wickets" INTEGER /* Number of five-wicket hauls */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the match (T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the statistics (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "number_of_maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Total number of maiden overs bowled */,
  "number_of_wides" INTEGER /* Total number of wides bowled */,
  "number_of_no_balls" INTEGER /* Total number of no-balls bowled */,
  "number_of_catches_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of catches taken */,
  "number_of_stumpings_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of stumpings taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Batsman, Bowler, All-rounder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_fielding_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role involves fielding */,
  "is_bowling_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role involves bowling */,
  "is_batting_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role involves batting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Coach, Analyst, Admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user (e.g., 1 for Coach, 2 for Analyst, 3 for Admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose statistics were accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., City, Country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_conditions" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "ground_conditions" TEXT /* Ground conditions during the match */,
  "match_format" TEXT /* Format of the match (T20, ODI, Test) */,
  "match_season" TEXT /* Season of the match (e.g., 2023-2024) */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Won, Lost, Drawn) */,
  "man_of_the_match" TEXT /* Player of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponent_teams" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent team */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the opponent faced */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "opponent_captain" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team's captain */,
  "opponent_coach" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team's coach */,
  "opponent_logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the opponent team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponent_teams_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES match_conditions ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opponent_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
